meta.title: Lora PMS — Run your hotel. Not the chaos.
meta.description: Lora PMS brings reservations, Channel Manager, Booking Online, Housekeeping, POS, Finance and Smart Pricing into one system.
meta.ogDescription: A modern hotel PMS for reservations, channels, payments and operations in one place.

hero.body: Reservations, Booking.com & Expedia, housekeeping, payments, POS and smart pricing — in one system.

integrations.caption: Built from Villa Mucho's real hospitality experience

features.title: A PMS that works like your team.
features.body: The modules work together, so information is entered once and used everywhere.

groups.title: Sell more
groups.description: More channels, more direct bookings and prices that respond to demand.

groups.title: Run every day
groups.description: From booking to check-out, every front-desk action follows one clear flow.

groups.title: Keep the team in control
groups.description: Clear tasks, secure roles and a complete history of every change.

groups.title: See the business clearly
groups.description: Revenue, collections and hotel performance without scattered spreadsheets.

reservations.title: Every reservation in its place.
reservations.body: OTA, website, phone or walk-in — everything appears in one calendar and one list.

housekeeping.title: Housekeeping without the phone calls.
housekeeping.body: Staff see priority rooms, checklists and issue reporting directly from their phones.

pos.title: Orders and the till connect to the hotel.
pos.body: Manage orders, shifts and payments; post charges to the room folio without double entry.

pricing.title: Smarter pricing, under your control.
pricing.body: See occupancy, demand and the daily suggestion. You decide what gets applied.

product.suggestionBody: Demand has increased and only 2 rooms remain.

pricing.title: Pay only for what you use.
pricing.body: Lora Core is the foundation. Activate the other modules to match the way your hotel works.
pricing.annualNote: The annual discount applies to subscriptions; the 1% fee does not change.

onboarding.title: We do not leave you with just a login.
onboarding.body: We help with setup, migration and channel connections.

steps.title: Create your hotel
steps.body: Set up rooms, room types, prices and users.

steps.title: Connect channels
steps.body: Connect Booking.com, Expedia and your other channels.

steps.title: Start working
steps.body: Train your team and go live with our support.

items.q: Does Lora PMS connect with Booking.com and Expedia?
items.a: Yes. Lora PMS uses Channel Manager to send availability and prices automatically and receive new reservations.
For a small hotel, the basic setup can be completed within a day. Channel connections and migration are handled together with our team.

items.q: Can I import my existing reservations?
items.a: Yes. Before going live, we plan the migration of rooms, prices, future reservations and guest profiles.

items.q: Can I activate only the modules I need?
items.a: Yes. Lora Core is the foundation, while Channel Manager, Booking Online, Housekeeping, POS, Smart Pricing and Finance can be activated as needed.

cta.title: Ready to run your hotel more simply?
cta.body: Tell us how your hotel works. We will show you the setup that fits.

footer.tagline: Run your hotel. Not the chaos.
